GeneralDescription.SourceString: He may have a lot to learn, but this young Avatar can save the world.
GeneralDescription.LocalizedString: He may have a lot to learn, but this young Avatar can save the world.

AdditionalDescription.SourceString: The last Airbender, Aang has been trapped in an iceberg for the past 100 years. Now that he's free, he must accept his responsibilities as the Avatar, master all four elements, and bring balance back to the world.
AdditionalDescription.LocalizedString: The last Airbender, Aang has been trapped in an iceberg for the past 100 years. Now that he's free, he must accept his responsibilities as the Avatar, master all four elements, and bring balance back to the world.
